rulings.Case Title: NANCY MARIE SCOTT et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JUNE 20, 2007, LINE 16. DEFENDANT SQUARE D COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT CREATED BY VASSALLO AND AY DECLARATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED REGARDING NEGLIGENCE AND STRICT LIABILITY, TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT CREATED BY DECLARATION OF VASSALLO AND AY. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED REGARDING FALSE REPRESENTATIONS FAILURE TO SHIFT. GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION REGARDING ENTERPRISE LIABILITY AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES, PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SHOW TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT EXISTED. =(302/PHA/AP)
